title: Call Center
descriptionPoints: Work as our support manager
Handle inbound customer calls and resolve queries professionally
Coordinate with internal teams to escalate and track issues
Maintain accurate call logs and follow-up records

title: Electronics Design Engineer
descriptionPoints: Design and develop innovative electronic products and solutions for industrial and telecom applications
Create schematics, PCB layouts, and design documentation
Collaborate with cross-functional teams on product validation and testing
Support manufacturing and field teams during product rollout

title: Embedded Systems Engineer
descriptionPoints: Develop firmware, communication protocols and embedded software solutions
Work on RTOS-based systems and device drivers
Debug hardware-software integration issues on the bench and in the field
Document firmware architecture and release notes

title: Mechanical Design Engineer
descriptionPoints: Design enclosures, mechanical assemblies and industrial products
Prepare 3D models, drawings, and BOMs for production
Perform tolerance analysis and design-for-manufacturing reviews
Support prototyping and validation of mechanical components

title: Sales Manager - Telecom
descriptionPoints: Drive business growth within telecom and infrastructure sectors
Build and manage relationships with key enterprise accounts
Prepare proposals, pricing, and commercial presentations
Coordinate with technical teams to deliver customer solutions

title: Project Coordinator
descriptionPoints: Support project execution, planning, scheduling and customer coordination
Track milestones, deliverables, and resource allocation
Prepare status reports and facilitate stakeholder meetings
Ensure timely communication between clients and internal teams
